mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_name, user_birth, user_nickname, user_email, user_phone, user_gender FROM ddd_user WHERE user_number = #{userNumber}
select count(user_number) from ddd_user where user_nickname = #{userNickname} AND user_number != #{userNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_user SET user_status = 'withdraw' WHERE user_number = #{userNumber}
